channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead

item.title: Gas canister in road, 14th June
item.description:
Gas canister in road outside a house called Tall Trees on Orpington Road. It has been there at least 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orpington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 14th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Two massive piles of rubbish dumped, 14th June
item.description:
This rubbish has been dumped here - disgusting mix of rubbish in a regular cut through for children on way to school/nursery - looks like Lewisham have visited but not sure why the delay to clear it. It’s been two weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Park, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish strewn all the way up the Green Chain path up Bleak Hill/Great Bartletts Wood, 14th June
item.description:
Walked this Green Chain section today and the path up Bleak Hill/Great Bartletts Wood from Windham Lane is strewn with what looks like bags and bags of household rubbish right up the path and off to the sides. Clothing, food packaging, umbrellas, and other debris. It’s completely disgusting. Goes nearly all the way to the top of the hill.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging shrubbery obstructing path, 14th June
item.description:
This has been ongoing for over a year and nothing seems to be done, the overhanging vegetation is obstructing the public footpath and those with pushchairs or those in wheelchairs are unable to safely get through.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Pantiles, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 14th June
item.description:
Dumped rubbish on green outside 76 Barham Road this is 2nd time filled out form first one wouldn't allow.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Barham Road, Chislehurst, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham

item.title: Illegal parking on double yellow lines, 14th June
item.description:
Regular dangerous illegal parking on double yellow lines on the junction of Wickham Lane & Bastion Road SE2. This dangerously limits vision out of Bastion Road into Wickham Lane.Under Highway Code Rule 243 you must not stop or park opposite or within 10 metres (32feet) of a junction,unless you are in an authorised parking space.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 14th June
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish bins, 14th June
item.description:
The three waste bins on the pathway at the bottom of the T GREEN serving Bostal Woods between Bastion Road and Rutherglen Road haven’t been emptied for weeks.All three are overflowing which encourages vermin and people to fly tip. These bins need emptying weekly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bastion Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned table, 14th June
item.description:
Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Lion Way, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish again outside 79 Glengarry Rd, 14th June
item.description:
Continuous dumped rubbish outside 79 Glengarry Rd. Council team to please clear and investigate with residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Glengarry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
